flavor: "Our dreams are a window into the hidden truths of not just our minds, but of the universe."
name: Carolyn Fern
text:
[reaction] After you heal 1 or more horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset: Discover 1 clue at your location. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1. Heal 1 horror from an investigator at your location.
back_flavor: Carolyn Fern has listened to her patients share their dreams for years, many so vivid they seem like actual memories. But she never expected to experience such things herself. Visions of dark caves deep beneath the surface of the world, of alien creatures creeping in the shadows, and of thousands of strands of glistening spiderwebs. Is her mind trying to remind her of something she witnessed in her past? A place she went? Or is it trying to warn her of something dangerous, something otherworldly, or even something catastrophic still to come?
back_text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Seeker cards ([seeker]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Experimental Psychology, Unbroken Web, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Experimental Psychology
text:
Carolyn Fern deck only.
[action]: Test [intellect] (2). If you succeed, heal 1 horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset at your location.
[reaction] After you heal horror from an investigator, exhaust Experimental Psychology: That investigator gets +2 skill value to their next skill test this round.

name: Unbroken Web
text: Revelation - Put this card into play in your threat area. [reaction] When you would discover any number of clues: Place that much horror on Unbroken Web, instead. Then, discard this card if there is 4 or more horror on it. Forced - When the game ends or you are eliminated: You earn 2 fewer experience.

flavor: If only you could get a closer look.
name: Lethal Curiosity
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (4). For each point you fail by, you must either take 1 damage or place 1 of your clues on your location.

name: Dreamer's Chronicle
text: Uses (4 secrets). [action] Spend 1 secret: Investigate ([intellect]). The first card you commit to this investigation gains [wild]. If you succeed, you may take 1 horror to discover 1 additional clue at your location.

name: Occult Records
text:
Uses (3 secrets).
[fast] During your turn, spend 1 secret and exhaust Occult Records: Heal 2 horror from an investigator at your location. Then, test [willpower] (2). If you fail, discard 1 card at random from your hand.

flavor: "Do you want to tell me about it?"
name: Private Practice
text:
Limit 1 per investigator.
[reaction] After you heal 1 or more horror, exhaust Private Practice: Gain 1 resource.

name: Psychology Student
text: [reaction] After you play Psychology Student: Heal 2 horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset at your location.

name: Scroll of the Pharaohs
text:
Uses (4 secrets).
[action] Spend 1 secret and exhaust Scroll of the Pharaohs: Deal 1 horror to an investigator or [[Ally]] asset at your location. Then, if there are no secrets on Scroll of the Pharaohs, discard it, draw 3 cards, and record "you have unearthed the secrets of the Pharaohs" in your campaign log.

name: University Archivist
text:
You have 1 additional hand slot, which can only be used to hold a [[Tome]] asset.
[reaction] After University Archivist enters play: Search the top 6 cards of your deck for a [[Tome]] asset and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.

name: Caustic Reaction
text: Fight ([intellect]). You get +1 [intellect] for this attack. If you control 2 or more clues, this attack deals +1 damage.

flavor: "Stay calm! We'll get out of this, yet."
name: Unflappable
text: Evade ([agility]). You get +2 [agility] for this evasion. If you succeed and you control 2 or more clues, heal 1 horror.

name: Psychoanalysis
text: Choose an investigator at your location and reveal the top 3 cards of their deck. That investigator may choose to either draw 1 revealed card and shuffle the rest into their deck, or heal 2 horror and return the revealed cards to the top of their owner's deck in any order.

flavor: "Hold on, now. Let's stop and think about this."
name: De-Escalate
text: Parley. Choose an enemy at your location. Heal horror equal to that enemy's horror value.

name: Insidious Truths
text: As an additional cost to play Insidious Truths, you may discard up to 2 cards from hand. Fight ([combat]). For each card discarded as part of this card's cost, you get +2 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack.

name: Establish Motive
text: If this skill test is successful, the performing investigator searches the top 6 cards of their deck for an [[Insight]] event, draws it, and shuffles their deck.

name: Literary Analysis
text: If this skill test is successful, replenish 1 secret on a [[Tome]] asset at your location.

flavor: "Stay calm! We'll get out of this, yet."
name: Unflappable
text: Evade ([agility]). You get +3 [agility] for this evasion. If you succeed, heal 2 horror from among cards you control.

flavor: You must record your findings, even if nobody believes you.
name: Typewriter
text:
Uses (3 secrets). If there are no secrets on Typewriter, discard it.
Secrets on Typewriter may be spent as if they were on [[Tome]] assets you control.

name: Caustic Reaction
text: Fight ([intellect]). You get +2 [intellect] and deal +1 damage for this attack. If you succeed and you control 2 or more clues, this attack deals +2 damage instead.

name: Hypnotize
text: Parley ([intellect]). You get +2 [intellect] for this parley. Choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location. This test's difficulty is equal to that enemy's remaining health. If you succeed, shuffle that enemy into the encounter deck.

name: Autopsy Report
text: [reaction] After an enemy at your location is defeated, exhaust Autopsy Report: Investigate ([intellect]). You get +X [intellect] for this investigation, where X is the defeated enemy's printed health (to a maximum of +5).

name: Sharp Rhetoric
text: Starting. (You may begin the game with 1 copy of a starting card in your opening hand.) [fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [intellect] for this skill test (+2 [intellect] instead if this is an investigation or parley). [fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [willpower] for this skill test (+2 [willpower] instead if this is an investigation or parley).

name: Psychoanalysis
text: One at a time, each investigator at your location reveals the top 3 cards of their deck, draws 1 of those cards, shuffles the remaining cards into their deck, and heals 2 horror.

name: Scroll of the Pharaohs
text:
Researched. Uses (4 secrets).
[action] Take 1 horror and spend 1 or 2 secrets: For each secret you spent as part of this ability's cost, reveal 3 cards from the top of the encounter deck. Choose and discard 1 non-peril, non-[[Elite]] card among them, then return the rest to the top of the encounter deck in any order.

name: Scroll of the Pharaohs
text: Researched. Uses (4 secrets). [action] Take 1 horror and spend 1 or 2 secrets: Fight ([intellect]). You get +3 [intellect] for this attack. If you succeed, this attack deals +1 damage for each secret you spent as part of this ability's cost.

name: Scroll of the Pharaohs
text: Researched. Uses (4 secrets). [action] Take 1 horror and spend 1 or 2 secrets: Investigate ([intellect]). You get +3 [intellect] for this investigation. If you succeed, discover 1 additional clue at your location for each secret you spent as part of this ability's cost.

name: Commune with the Cosmos
text: When you play Commune with the Cosmos, you may take up to 3 horror. Investigate ([intellect]). You get +2 [intellect] for this investigation. If you succeed, discover X additional clues at your location, where X is the amount of horror on you (to a maximum of 4 additional clues).
